credentials.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
credentials.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials to get the device encryption key. This is needed only once.

⚠️ If you get an authentication error, open the Smart Life / MOES app and make sure your CO2 sensor is connected — this refreshes the encryption key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not get device key from Tuya cloud. Check your credentials.
error.no_devices_found: No CO2 BLE devices found nearby
error.invalid_local_key: Device rejected the encryption key. Please open Smart Life / MOES app, make sure the device is connected, then try again to get a fresh key from Tuya cloud.
error.ble_auth_failed: BLE authentication failed. The local key may be outdated. Open Smart Life app → ensure the device is online → re-add this integration.

abort.no_devices_found: No CO2 BLE devices found. Make sure the device is nearby and powered on.

data.scan_interval: Update interval (seconds, only for Smart mode)
